name: openmontage-remotion-composer
description: Remotion composition renderer for OpenMontage animated explainer videos

scripts.studio:zh: node scripts/patch-studio-composition-list.cjs && npx remotion studio src/index.tsx --props=public/demo-props/sunlit-heart-remotion-20s-zh.json --port=3001 --force-new
scripts.build: npx remotion render src/index.tsx Explainer out/video.mp4
